warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Practice grammatical gender and accusative article agreement (ein/eine/einen) with common food and drink nouns, specifically focusing on feminine nouns like 'die Melange' and masculine nouns like 'der Apfelstrudel' and 'der Kaffee', using flashcard drills and short ordering dialogues.
speaking_prompt: You arrive at your hotel near the Ringstraße after a long flight. Herr Fischer greets you at the front desk. Check in, ask about the WiFi, and confirm your checkout date.
carry_forward_errors: Aber meine Frau hat noch nichts bestellt. (was: Aber meine Frau hat Nick bestellen.) — session 2026-05-04
